name: fu-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code tooling: error-tracking sweep, PR review, orders-API inspection, pg/mssql-stage DB access, and ce-compound.

plugins.name: fu-et-sweep
plugins.description: Sweep a service's Datadog Error Tracking into de-duped GitHub issues with drafted root-cause writeups.

plugins.name: fu-inspecting-orders-api
plugins.description: Inspect an Orders API (orders, payloads, hierarchy) from config-resolved host + token.

plugins.name: fu-pg-stage
plugins.description: Connect to a Postgres DB whose credentials come from HashiCorp Vault's database secrets engine.

plugins.name: fu-mssql-stage
plugins.description: Connect to a SQL Server DB whose credentials come from HashiCorp Vault's database secrets engine.

plugins.name: fu-ce-compound
plugins.description: Document a recently solved problem to compound your team's knowledge (fork of EveryInc ce-compound).

plugins.name: fu-dev-guards
plugins.description: Dev safety guards: worktree path enforcement, protected-branch commit blocking, and dotnet format pre-commit.
